General.Name: Ridley Corporation Ltd
General.Description: Ridley Corporation Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the provision of animal nutrition solutions in Australia the United States, New Zealand, and Thailand. It operates through two segments, Packaged Feeds and Ingredients, and Bulk Stockfeeds. The company provides aqua feeds, bulk ruminant stockfeeds, bulk monogastric stockfeeds, animal proteins and oils, and commodities; and NovaqPro, as well as engages in specialty products distribution. It also engages in the retail of animal feeds. Ridley Corporation Limited was incorporated in 1987 and is headquartered in Melbourne, Australia.
General.Address: South Tower Rialto, Melbourne, VIC, Australia, 3000
